questionHtml:
A cell has an emf of 4.0 V and an internal resistance of 2.0 Ω. The ideal voltmeter reads 3.2 V.

                                                          

What is the resistance of R?

A.     0.8 Ω

B.     2.0 Ω

C.     4.0 Ω

D.     8.0 Ω

meta.title: A cell has an emf of 4.0 V and an internal resistance of 2.0 Ω. The ideal voltmeter reads 3.2 V. What is the resistance of R? A. 0.8 Ω B. 2.0 Ω C. 4.0 Ω D. 8.0 Ω
